description: Load the 5 FITS images located in ~/AstroImages/raw/asteroid_sequence/ into AstroImageJ as an Image Sequence (File -> Import -> Image Sequence). Blink through the frames using the stack controls to locate the moving asteroid (a point source moving against the static star field). Using the Point or Multi-point tool, measure the asteroid's center coordinates in the first frame (Slice 1), then navigate to the last frame (Slice 5) and measure its new center coordinates. Save the resulting measurement table as a CSV file to ~/AstroImages/measurements/asteroid_track.csv.
